decisions.title: Prioritize Canvas GA readiness over Explore V2 enhancements
decisions.context: 30+ Canvas tickets active (versioning, disposition, sharelinks, archive, markdown). Canvas is critical to 'Embed Deeper' pillar but needs consolidation to avoid feature sprawl. Explore V2 work (family candidates, hovercards) is incremental.

arguments.for: Canvas directly drives 'Decisions Captured Per Customer' NSM. High signal density in tickets suggests customer pull. GA unlock enables enterprise adoption.
arguments.against: Explore V2 improvements (ENG-10214, ENG-9924, ENG-10241) impact daily analyst workflows. Delaying risks retention in core product (Nail the Core pillar).

decisions.title: Consolidate SCIM security work into dedicated sprint
decisions.context: ENG-9785 (block email invites) and ENG-9784 (block admin deactivation) are SCIM-managed org hardening. Scattered execution risks incomplete security posture.

arguments.for: Security work must be atomic. Bundling reduces context switching and ensures complete SCIM compliance (Build the Moat).
arguments.against: Current in-flight work may already be near completion. Bundling could delay individual ticket delivery.

decisions.title: Deploy Sift Edge buffer flush metrics to production
decisions.context: ENG-9561 adds buffer flush rate metrics. Edge is a 2026 strategic product. Observability gaps risk customer incidents and reduce signal quality for 'Ask SIFT'.
decisions.blockedBy: ENG-10249 (FF for worker deployments) and ENG-10199 (Canary + Alarms) must complete first to ensure safe rollout

arguments.for: Metrics unblock proactive Edge support, reducing churn risk. Aligns with Signal>Evidence>Decision by surfacing edge-layer signals.
arguments.against: Premature deployment without canary infrastructure (ENG-10199) could cause production incidents.

decisions.title: Defer Grafana plugin 'Group By' feature
decisions.context: ENG-8735 adds asset combination grouping to Grafana plugin. Low strategic alignment—Grafana is not a core 2026 product focus.

arguments.for: Engineering capacity better spent on Canvas, Edge, or Python Rules. Grafana is peripheral to NSM and pillars.
arguments.against: May be customer-requested. Deferring could signal deprioritization of existing integrations (Embed Deeper risk).

decisions.title: Establish Canvas metadata standards before block proliferation
decisions.context: ENG-10094 (Canvas block metadata 1-pager) suggests undefined block schema. Canvas has 8+ feature tickets in flight. Metadata chaos will compound.

arguments.for: Schema standardization now prevents technical debt. Enables future AI features (Ask SIFT integration) and version control (ENG-9442).
arguments.against: Slows current feature velocity. Team may already have implicit standards.

timeAudit.weekSummary: High meeting load (80% time). Canvas proliferation and SCIM security work suggest need for dedicated decision-making sessions.
alerts: 30+ engineering tickets in signals—potential thrash risk
